creator: toni.viemero@iki.fi
text:
> I have rather repeatable (what seems like) deadlock here.

I didn't get deadlocks, but earlier rtorrent(-devel) did crash _a_lot_ for
me when hashing and downloading fast(ish).
I've sent patches to upgrade libtorrent-devel and rtorrent-devel packages,
which have been behaving very nice.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103508
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103509

-- 
Toni Viemerö  |  http://selfdestruct.net/
"Sometimes the truth hurts. And sometimes it feels real good."
